name: gads-transparency-mcp
description: Research competitor ads from Google Ads Transparency Center — search advertisers, analyze ad creatives, and compare ad presence across 42 regions.

tools.name: search_advertiser
tools.description: Search for advertisers by website domain or brand name

tools.name: get_advertiser_ads
tools.description: Get all ads currently running for a specific advertiser

tools.name: get_ad_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific ad creative

tools.name: get_advertiser_profile
tools.description: Get advertiser profile, verification status, and ad activity summary

tools.name: compare_ad_presence
tools.description: Compare ad presence across multiple geographic regions
